name: Zettelkasten Second Memory System
description: Atomic note-taking, bi‑directional linking, and knowledge‑graph distillation for OpenClaw. Provides a structured second‑memory system with confidence‑routed inbox processing and nightly distillation.

notesDir.label: Notes Directory
notesDir.help: Filesystem path where Zettelkasten Markdown notes will be stored.

databasePath.label: Database Path
databasePath.help: SQLite database file path for storing links, tags, and metadata.

agentConfigs.chat.tools.label: Chat Agent Tools
agentConfigs.chat.tools.help: MCP tools accessible to the front‑brain (chat agent) – read‑only subset.

agentConfigs.knowledge.tools.label: Knowledge Agent Tools
agentConfigs.knowledge.tools.help: MCP tools accessible to the back‑brain (knowledge agent) – full read‑write access.

nightlyDistill.enabled.label: Enable Nightly Distillation
nightlyDistill.enabled.help: Run CEQRC distillation pipeline every night at 2:00 AM.

nightlyDistill.cronExpression.label: Nightly Distillation Schedule
nightlyDistill.cronExpression.help: Cron expression for automatic distillation (default: 0 2 * * * – 2 AM daily).

sessionHook.enabled.label: Enable Session Hook
sessionHook.enabled.help: Automatically distill session memories when a session ends.

confidenceThreshold.zettels.label: Zettels Confidence Threshold
confidenceThreshold.zettels.help: Minimum confidence score (0.0‑1.0) for a note to be routed to the permanent zettels folder.

confidenceThreshold.references.label: References Confidence Threshold
confidenceThreshold.references.help: Minimum confidence score for a note to be moved from inbox to references.
